headline: With a lifetime of experience in the out-of-home industry, I help OOH media owners scale and monetise their assets.
summary:
I can help you in two ways 👇

My experience in out of home (OOH) media spans more than 30 years.

Having witnessed the industry's digital transformation, I have pioneered new and emerging formats, technologies and delivery platforms.

I serve on various boards as an executive or advisor, including:

1) DoohClick AB.

↳ DoohClick is a state-of-the-art ad tech platform built from the ground up by OOH media owners for OOH owners.

It serves both classic and digital OOH formats.

DoohClick is a fully independent company, providing complete sales support, dynamic scheduling, programmatic improved analysis and fast reporting.

2) Portfolio Media Management.

↳ A global out-of-home and advertising consultancy founded in 2003, we develop & manage iconic locations across the UK and globally.

PMM works with both media organisations and private and corporate organisations.

3) BB Media Assets Limited.

↳ A private investment fund specialising in the acquisition of OOH Media income-producing real estate. We are privately funded and operate across the U.K.

I believe that the OOH industry is stronger when we work together. If you want to chat, reach out to me directly → mbracey@portfolio-media.com

experiences.title: Co-Founder & CCO
experiences.description: Bring your OOH media into the 21st century. DoohClick is a tech platform designed to give OOH media owners a real time ad serving ecosystem. It delivers complete sales support, dynamic scheduling, improved analysis and rapid reporting. The platform also includes a CMS, an ad server, a video player and an analytics tool all within the same intuitive workflow.

experiences.title: Founder and CEO
experiences.description: Established in 2003, PMM specialises in the development and management of iconic OOH locations in the UK and internationally. We cater to private firms, corporations, and local governments.

experiences.title: Founder & Former CEO
experiences.description: A private investment fund, specialised in acquisition of OOH Media income-producing real estate. Acquired by Wildstone in October 2024.

experiences.title: Group Commercial Director ( Consultancy ).
experiences.description: Elonex is a DOOH advertising network including large-format roadside LED billboards, and digital screens at entertainment venues, shopping malls and sports stadiums.

experiences.title: Consultant
experiences.description: Ocean Outdoor specialises in large-format digital OOH across premium locations in the UK.

experiences.title: Group International Development Director
experiences.description:
Asset management, operations, and development of strategic digital locations across the UK.

During my time I set up The Alliance, a worldwide consortium of DOOH businesses, many of which have since been acquired by Ocean Outdoor.
